creator: kbowling@freebsd.org
text: We do want to move to mesa 21.2 when it is released, so I think you should work with upstream and Jan to see if you can figure out what is going on here.  We may not necessarily be able to or need to support crocus with the initial ports bump, Hopefully we'll be able to see how other *nix distributions handle this as well for inspiration, there are some changes that will affect packagers like the 'amber' LTS release which will allow the legacy drivers to be used for compatibility like this.
